General.Name: Weilong Delicious Global Hldg
General.Description: WEILONG Delicious Global Holdings Ltd produces and sells spicy snack food in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers seasoned flour, vegetable products, egg- based, bean-based, and other products. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Luohe, the People's Republic of China. WEILONG Delicious Global Holdings Ltd is a subsidiary of Hh Global Capital Ltd.
